components.name: InputComponent
SelectComponent
components.templateData:
<select
  [disabled]="disabled"
  [class.focused]="focused"
  [class.has-value]="value"
  (change)="onSelect($event)"
  (focus)="focused = true; onTouched()"
  (blur)="focused = false">
  <option value="" disabled [selected]="!value">{{ placeholder }}</option>
  <option *ngFor="let opt of options" [value]="opt.value">{{ opt.label }}</option>
</select>

components.name: StatCellComponent
TastingNoteComponent
TextareaComponent
WineCardComponent
components.templateData:
{{ bottle.vintage }}
{{ bottle.name }}
{{ bottle.designation }}
×{{ bottle.quantity }} btl.

components.name: WineTypeBadgeComponent

    CHAMPAGNE: { label: 'Champagne', css: 'champagne' },
